series_metadata.series_title: Membership Registration Forms Information submitted by licensed attorneys requesting to become members of the Virginia State Bar. Data from these hardcopy forms are entered into the VSB Membership Database (refer to Specific Schedule No. 117-003.)

retention_rules.trigger_event: 25 years; in compliance with No. 8 on schedule cover page. Total retention 75 years
